generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While we debate civil defense budgets, foreign adversaries are actively undermining our preparedness. A recent report shows that critical infrastructure in our region is vulnerable to attacks we're not properly preparing for. Our leaders are distracted by partisan fights while real threats grow. It's time to demand accountability and real investment in local resilience. #CivilDefenseMatters #SecurityFirst
